data.title: Update project docs to reflect plugin portability migration and enforcement hook
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section (script path convention), docs/reference/system-landscape.md (plugin distribution boundary section), and llms.txt to reflect the _PLUGIN_ROOT convention, the ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ markdown reference pattern, and the check-plugin-self-ref.sh enforcement hook.
**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate documentation of the new conventions so they follow the established patterns rather than re-introducing hardcoded paths.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md, docs/reference/system-landscape.md, llms.txt — existing docs that become stale after this epic
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern and the plugin-self-ref-ok suppression annotation for scripts that use git-relative patterns
  ← Satisfies: "grep -r 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/ returns zero matches"
- When this story is complete, docs/reference/system-landscape.md Plugin Distribution Boundary section accurately reflects that plugins/dso/ is the local install path and plugin files must not hardcode it
  ← Satisfies: "grep -r 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/ returns zero matches"
- When this story is complete, llms.txt includes entries for the enforcement hook at .claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting, structure, and conventions.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
